description: User can register with email, password, and username
steps: Step 1: Navigate to registration page
Step 2: Fill in email, username, and password fields
Step 3: Click 'Register' button
Step 4: Verify account created and redirected to home page

description: User can login with either email or username
steps: Step 1: Navigate to login page
Step 2: Enter registered email or username
Step 3: Enter correct password
Step 4: Click 'Login' button
Step 5: Verify successful login and redirection

description: Admin can access the admin dashboard
steps: Step 1: Login with admin credentials
Step 2: Navigate to /admin
Step 3: Verify admin dashboard content is visible

description: User can see the 104 matches of World Cup 2026
steps: Step 1: Navigate to /matches page
Step 2: Verify match list is displayed
Step 3: Verify count of matches matches expectation (104)

description: User can submit predictions for group stage matches
steps: Step 1: Navigate to /my-prediction page
Step 2: Select a group stage match
Step 3: Enter home and away scores
Step 4: Click 'Save Draft' or wait for auto-save
Step 5: Refresh page and verify scores are persisted

description: Knockout matches auto-populate based on group predictions
steps: Step 1: Complete predictions for all matches in a group
Step 2: Navigate to knockout bracket view
Step 3: Verify qualifiers from that group appear in the bracket

description: Admin can enter match results manually
steps: Step 1: Log in as admin
Step 2: Navigate to Admin Match Management
Step 3: Enter scores for a finished match
Step 4: Click 'Save result'
Step 5: Verify scores update on the public matches page
